data.title: Envirotech Vehicles Faces Nasdaq Compliance and Meeting Challenges
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Envirotech Vehicles ( (EVTV) ) has issued an update.

On January 15, 2026, Envirotech Vehicles, Inc. received a notice from Nasdaq’s Listing Qualifications Department indicating that the company was no longer in compliance with the exchange’s requirement to hold an annual stockholders’ meeting within twelve months of the fiscal year end, triggering a 45-day period to submit a plan to regain compliance and the possibility of an extension of up to 180 days from the fiscal year end. The company, which had previously adjourned its 2025 annual meeting from December 30, 2025, to January 20, 2026, commenced the meeting on January 20 but again adjourned it to February 3, 2026, due to lack of quorum, and is now actively soliciting additional shareholder votes—including by hiring proxy solicitor InvestorCom LLC—in an effort to secure quorum, complete the voting on existing proposals, and address the Nasdaq compliance deficiency, a process that may affect its listing status and corporate governance standing if not resolved within the allowed timelines.

The most recent analyst rating on (EVTV) stock is a Hold with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Envirotech Vehicles stock, see the EVTV Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on EVTV Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, EVTV is a Neutral.

The score is held down primarily by weak financial performance—negative gross profit, widening losses, shrinking equity with higher leverage, and ongoing negative operating/free cash flow. Technicals are a partial offset due to strong price momentum, but overbought signals raise near-term risk; valuation remains constrained by losses and no dividend, while the recent equity raise helps listing compliance but introduces dilution and does not remove financial stability concerns.

To see Spark’s full report on EVTV stock, click here.

More about Envirotech Vehicles

Envirotech Vehicles, Inc. is a publicly traded company listed on Nasdaq that is subject to U.S. securities regulations and stock exchange corporate governance requirements, including the obligation to hold an annual meeting of stockholders within twelve months of its fiscal year end.

Average Trading Volume: 25,968,624

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $17.14M

See more insights into EVTV stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Great Western to Drill Core of Potentially Large Copper-Gold System at Yerrida North
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Great Western Exploration Limited ( (AU:GTE) ) has provided an announcement.

Great Western Exploration has secured all permits and engaged a contractor to begin diamond drilling in March 2026 at its Oval Copper-Gold Targets within the Yerrida North Project in Western Australia, aiming to test a 750m-deep hole into a coincident gravity anomaly and modelled VHMS horizon interpreted as the core of a potentially large copper-gold mineralisation system. Ground gravity and geological modelling indicate that the Oval and Oval South targets are part of a single VHMS system analogous to Sandfire Resources’ nearby DeGrussa and Monty deposits, with the gravity high coinciding with a strongly mineralised siltstone horizon, and the company plans to follow this campaign with drilling of six additional Juggernaut copper-gold targets once access approvals are finalised, underscoring an aggressive exploration push in a highly prospective belt.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:GTE) stock is a Hold with a A$0.02 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Great Western Exploration Limited stock, see the AU:GTE Stock Forecast page.

More about Great Western Exploration Limited

Great Western Exploration Limited is an Australian mineral exploration company focused on discovering and developing base and precious metal deposits, particularly copper and gold. Its key projects include the Yerrida North Project in Western Australia, located in a region geologically analogous to the Bryah Basin, which hosts the DeGrussa Copper-Gold Deposit, positioning the company within a highly prospective VHMS (Volcanic Hosted Massive Sulphide) district.

Average Trading Volume: 622,699

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$9.65M

For a thorough assessment of GTE stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Harvard Bioscience Lowers Quorum Requirement for Shareholders
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions

Harvard Bioscience ( (HBIO) ) just unveiled an update.

On January 19, 2026, Harvard Bioscience’s Board of Directors approved an amendment to the company’s Amended and Restated By-laws that lowers the quorum requirement for stockholder meetings from a majority to one-third of the shares entitled to vote. The change, which took effect immediately upon Board approval, is expected to make it easier for the company to achieve quorum at shareholder meetings, potentially streamlining corporate governance processes and facilitating timely decision-making for investors and management.

The most recent analyst rating on (HBIO) stock is a Hold with a $0.65 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Harvard Bioscience stock, see the HBIO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HBIO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HBIO is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance (declining revenue, losses, and leverage), with only partial support from improving cash flow. The earnings call was a relative positive—showing margin/EBITDA improvement, cost discipline, better cash generation, and debt reduction—but technical indicators remain soft and valuation is not informative due to negative earnings.

To see Spark’s full report on HBIO stock, click here.

More about Harvard Bioscience

Harvard Bioscience, Inc. is a life sciences tools company that develops and supplies specialized instruments, systems, and technologies used in biological and medical research, serving academic, pharmaceutical, and biotechnology customers worldwide.

data.title: SEGG Media Completes Direct Offering and Restructures Financing
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

SEGG Media ( (SEGG) ) has shared an update.

On January 20, 2026, SEGG Media Corporation closed a registered direct offering of 2,449,857 shares of common stock at $0.70 per share, raising roughly $1.7 million in gross proceeds, after appointing Dawson James Securities as placement agent under a best-efforts mandate. The company plans to deploy the funds for working capital, to advance previously announced acquisitions of revenue-generating, cash-flow-positive businesses and for other general corporate purposes, while it simultaneously withdrew from two earlier financing arrangements—a $2.5 million note and securities purchase agreement with Evergreen Capital Markets LLC, under which only $500,000 was drawn, and a $150 million loan agreement with United Capital Investments London Limited—moves it says should avoid significant equity issuance and dilution, support its acquisition-focused growth strategy, and better align its capital structure with its long-term objectives without materially affecting current liquidity or operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (SEGG) stock is a Buy with a $15.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on SEGG Media stock, see the SEGG Stock Forecast page.

More about SEGG Media

SEGG Media Corporation, formerly operating as Lottery.com Inc., is a global sports, entertainment and gaming group that integrates traditional assets with blockchain technology. Through a portfolio of digital platforms including Sports.com, Concerts.com, TicketStub.com and Lottery.com, the Nasdaq-listed company focuses on immersive fan engagement, ethical gaming and AI-driven live experiences for global audiences.

Average Trading Volume: 6,549,661

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $6.58M

data.title: Helio Corporation Appoints Veteran CFO to Strengthen Governance
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Helio Corporation ( (HLEO) ) has provided an announcement.

On January 19, 2026, Helio Corporation’s board appointed veteran Certified Public Accountant Mark Knauf as Chief Financial Officer, a move aimed at strengthening financial governance as the company advances its space-based energy initiatives and seeks to uplist from the OTC market to the New York Stock Exchange. Knauf, who brings over three decades of accounting and financial leadership experience, including prior CFO roles, will oversee financial operations, capital planning, internal controls, and strategic budgeting, under an initial one-year employment agreement that grants him up to 100,000 restricted shares vesting over a year and a cash salary contingent on Helio raising at least $10 million. His appointment is framed by Helio’s board as critical to remediating previously disclosed material weaknesses in internal controls, bolstering GAAP and SEC compliance, and enhancing institutional credibility and long-term shareholder value as the company works to update its active NYSE listing application and SEC registration in connection with its year-end reporting.

More about Helio Corporation

Helio Corporation, founded in 2018 and based in Berkeley, California, operates in the space and clean-energy sectors, developing space-based power systems that capture solar energy in orbit and beam it to Earth as carbon-free electricity. The company designs space mechanisms, advanced antenna systems, and space design solutions for NASA, the European Space Agency, private aerospace firms, universities, and global space agencies, positioning its orbital energy platforms as a potential new layer of the global power grid and serving more than a dozen space-industry partners across missions from small-scale programs to flagship initiatives.

Average Trading Volume: 29,084

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

See more insights into HLEO stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

FendX Technologies Inc. announced it will participate in the 3rd Annual DealFlow Discovery Conference at The Borgata in Atlantic City on January 28–29, 2026, where CEO Carolyn Myers will present the company’s recent developments, growth strategy and investment proposition and hold one-on-one meetings with investors. Leveraging proprietary technologies, it is advancing a portfolio of protective surface coatings, including its REPELWRAP film, a liquid-based nano-coating technology and a specialized Foley catheter coating, with a focus on building a robust intellectual property portfolio and enhancing hygiene and safety across healthcare, consumer and commercial markets.

On January 19, 2026, Forestar Group held its Annual Meeting of Stockholders, where shareholders voted on the election of seven director nominees, an advisory approval of executive compensation, and the ratification of the company’s independent auditor for fiscal 2026. data.title: Core Silver Extends Laverdiere Porphyry System by 280 Metres in 2025 Drilling
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Core Assets Corp. ( (TSE:CC) ) is now available.

Core Silver Corp. has confirmed a 280-metre expansion of the Laverdiere Porphyry System at its Laverdiere Copper Project in northwestern British Columbia, with drill hole LAV25-013 intersecting well-developed copper-molybdenum mineralization from surface to more than 1,050 metres depth. The 2025 drilling results demonstrate that mineralization is now defined over roughly 675 metres between recent holes and 2.3 kilometres between the Valley and Main Zones, with porphyry-style alteration and mineralization remaining open both near surface and at depth across a 4.5-kilometre by 3.1-kilometre footprint, underscoring the potential scale and continuity of this large multi-phase porphyry system and supporting further expansion through follow-up drilling, while assay and soil geochemistry results are still pending.

Spark’s Take on TSE:CC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:CC is a Neutral.

Core Assets Corp. is under significant financial strain due to its lack of revenue and persistent losses, which heavily weigh down its overall score. Technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, further adding to the stock’s challenges. Valuation metrics are unfavorable with a negative P/E ratio. However, the recent corporate discovery provides a positive outlook, offering a potential strategic opportunity for future growth.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:CC stock, click here.

More about Core Assets Corp.

Core Silver Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on copper and associated metals, advancing its Laverdiere Copper Project on the eastern Blue Property in the Atlin Mining District of northwestern British Columbia. The company’s work targets a large, multi-phase Cu-Mo-Ag±Au porphyry system through diamond drilling, structural mapping and surface sampling across multiple zones along the Valley Fault Zone.

Average Trading Volume: 35,361

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$10.17M

data.title: DirectBooking Technology Posts Sharp Interim Loss on Revenue Slump in Hong Kong Construction Market
data.description:
Claim 50% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from DirectBooking Technology ( (ZDAI) ) is now available.

On January 20, 2026, DirectBooking Technology Co., Ltd. furnished its unaudited interim condensed consolidated financial statements for the six months ended September 30, 2025, to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission via a Form 6-K filing, incorporating the figures into its recently filed shelf registration statement. The interim data highlight a sharp contraction in business performance, with total revenues for the period falling 43.2% year on year to US$5.44 million, gross profit plunging 94.7% to US$74,635, and income from operations swinging from a profit of US$623,564 to a loss of US$5.12 million, driven by weaker construction activity and a surge in general and administrative expenses, signaling mounting operational and profitability pressures for the Hong Kong-based subcontractor within a challenging local construction market.

More about DirectBooking Technology

DirectBooking Technology Co., Ltd. operates in Hong Kong’s construction sector as a transportation services provider focused on environmentally friendly handling and reuse of construction and demolition materials. Through its Hong Kong operating subsidiary, the company primarily offers soil and rock transportation, as well as construction services such as excavation and lateral support (ELS) works and bored piling, typically acting as a subcontractor to other local construction contractors.

Average Trading Volume: 869,512

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $14.99M

See more insights into ZDAI stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.
